description: Manage restaurant bookings via Claude — read covers, find guests, move tables, send wedding quotes.
name: io.github.nicklasmenschel/gerezi-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Gerezi API key (tbl_live_*). Get one from https://www.gerezi.com/settings/api-keys
environmentVariables.name: GEREZI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Gerezi API base URL. Defaults to https://www.gerezi.com — only override for self-hosted Gerezi installs.
environmentVariables.name: GEREZI_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional restaurant slug for logging context. The API key already scopes the request to your restaurant.
environmentVariables.name: GEREZI_RESTAURANT_SLUG

environmentVariables.description: Which tool surface to expose. "1" = read-only (5 tools). "2" = read+write (15 tools, includes booking creation, cancellation, quotes). Defaults to "1".
environmentVariables.name: GEREZI_MCP_PHASE
